Summary: S3-001 Implement Document Library List View
Description: Story ID: S3-001\nOutcome: Users can view all their documents in a global library.\nRules: S3-BR-001, S3-BR-002

Summary: S3-002 Implement Document Metadata Model and Persistence
Description: Story ID: S3-002\nOutcome: Documents support title, type, status, tags, ownership, and timestamps.\nRules: S3-BR-001, S3-BR-002, S3-BR-003

Summary: S3-003 Implement Document Version Model and Persistence
Description: Story ID: S3-003\nOutcome: Documents support version history with version metadata.\nRules: S3-BR-007, S3-BR-008

Summary: S3-004 Implement Document Upload Workflow
Description: Story ID: S3-004\nOutcome: Users can upload supported document files, validate file constraints, and store them in library records.\nRules: S3-BR-001, S3-BR-004, S3-BR-005

Summary: S3-005 Implement Document Download Export Workflow
Description: Story ID: S3-005\nOutcome: Users can download/export selected document versions from library and job context views.\nRules: S3-BR-006

Summary: S3-006 Implement Library Filtering and Sorting
Description: Story ID: S3-006\nOutcome: Users can filter/sort by type, status, tag, and updated date.\nRules: S3-BR-001

Summary: S3-007 Implement Document Duplicate and Rename Actions
Description: Story ID: S3-007\nOutcome: Users can duplicate existing artifacts and rename cleanly.\nRules: S3-BR-007, S3-BR-008

Summary: S3-008 Implement Archive and Restore for Documents
Description: Story ID: S3-008\nOutcome: Users can archive and restore documents without hard deletion.\nRules: S3-BR-009

Summary: S3-009 Implement Job to Library Linking UX
Description: Story ID: S3-009\nOutcome: Job detail allows linking/unlinking library documents to applications.\nRules: S3-BR-010, S3-BR-011, S3-BR-012

Summary: S3-010 Implement Library Visibility in Job Detail Context
Description: Story ID: S3-010\nOutcome: Job detail displays linked documents and relevant versions clearly.\nRules: S3-BR-010, S3-BR-012

Summary: S3-011 Implement Company Research Input and Prompt UX in Job Detail
Description: Story ID: S3-011\nOutcome: Users can trigger AI-assisted company research from job detail using user-provided context.\nRules: S3-BR-002

Summary: S3-012 Persist Company Research Notes to Job Record
Description: Story ID: S3-012\nOutcome: Research output is saved as editable notes tied to the job.\nRules: S3-BR-002, S3-BR-003

Summary: S3-013 Add Interview Preparation Notes Section in Job Detail
Description: Story ID: S3-013\nOutcome: Users can maintain structured prep notes for interviews.\nRules: S3-BR-003

Summary: S3-014 Expand Dashboard Analytics Velocity and Stage Conversion
Description: Story ID: S3-014\nOutcome: Dashboard includes conversion and time-in-stage analytics from stored events.\nRules: S3-BR-013, S3-BR-014, S3-BR-015

Summary: S3-015 Provision Cloud Runtime for Frontend and Backend
Description: Story ID: S3-015\nOutcome: App is deployed to cloud with public URL and documented environment setup.\nRules: S3-BR-016, S3-BR-017

Summary: S3-016 Configure Production Database and Migrations
Description: Story ID: S3-016\nOutcome: Production data store is provisioned with migration strategy and rollback plan.\nRules: S3-BR-018

Summary: S3-017 Configure CI CD Deployment Pipeline
Description: Story ID: S3-017\nOutcome: Merge to main triggers production deployment with health checks.\nRules: S3-BR-016, S3-BR-017

Summary: S3-018 Implement Centralized Error Handling and Logging
Description: Story ID: S3-018\nOutcome: Server/client errors are captured consistently with actionable context.\nRules: S3-BR-019

Summary: S3-019 Implement Performance and Accessibility Pass
Description: Story ID: S3-019\nOutcome: Team executes and documents fixes for major performance/accessibility issues.\nRules: S3-BR-019, S3-BR-020

Summary: S3-020 Expand Unit Test Coverage for Security and Ownership Rules
Description: Story ID: S3-020\nOutcome: Critical authorization and ownership enforcement paths are unit-tested.\nRules: S3-BR-002

Summary: S3-021 Expand Unit Test Coverage for Document Logic
Description: Story ID: S3-021\nOutcome: Document versioning, archive/restore, upload/download, and job-link ownership rules are unit-tested.\nRules: S3-BR-007, S3-BR-010, S3-BR-012

Summary: S3-022 Final Release Readiness and Demo Hardening
Description: Story ID: S3-022\nOutcome: Team completes release checklist, smoke tests, and demo stabilization.\nRules: S3-BR-016, S3-BR-017, S3-BR-020
